title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Liberty Shoes - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Liberty Shoes! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Liberty Shoes:
Liberty Shoes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liberty Shoes!
